description: Per-village innkeeper dialogue. 11 villages × 7 lines each. Each village has a distinct voice derived from its world's aesthetic and the novella content. Wire from InnScene.gd via village_id → lookup.

harmonia.greeting: Welcome to the Silver Harp, travelers. The hearth is lit and the beds are turned.
harmonia.rest_prompt: A clean room and a warm meal — %d gold, and worth every piece.
harmonia.rest_confirm: Rest easy. I'll keep the lanterns low.
harmonia.rest_complete: Dawn already. You look ten years younger. Best of luck on the road.
harmonia.save_prompt: I'll note your stay in the guest ledger. It stays on record.
harmonia.cant_afford: Coin short? The stable's warm enough for a copper, but I can't do less than that.
harmonia.farewell: May the road rise to meet you. Do come back.

eldertree.greeting: Oh. You. The bed is too short. The ceiling is too low. Please proceed anyway.
eldertree.rest_prompt: %d gold. The price is higher for mortals. This is not discrimination; it is arithmetic.
eldertree.rest_confirm: Sleep. We will sing about you. You will not understand the song.
eldertree.rest_complete: You slept eight hours. For us, this is a nap. For you, apparently, everything.
eldertree.save_prompt: We will remember you came here. We remember everything. It is our least favorite quality.
eldertree.cant_afford: You brought no gold to Eldertree? How very on-theme for your species.
eldertree.farewell: Go. The trees will watch you leave. They watch everything. It's fine.

frosthold.rest_confirm: Sleep. Don't die in it. Drafts from the north.
frosthold.rest_complete: Morning. You're alive. I noted the hour.
frosthold.save_prompt: Your name goes in the book. The book survives fires. It has.
frosthold.cant_afford: No gold, no bed. The ice outside is also a bed.

grimhollow.greeting: A room? Yes. One left. It has always been the last one. Every traveler says so.
grimhollow.rest_prompt: %d gold. Don't ask what's in the walls. Don't listen for it either.
grimhollow.rest_confirm: Blow out the candle. Please. The thing in the bog can see the light.
grimhollow.rest_complete: You woke up. Oh. That's good. That's the preferred outcome.
grimhollow.save_prompt: I'll carve your name by the door. Next to the others. Yes, all of them.
grimhollow.cant_afford: The swamp takes what the inn can't. Come back when you have coin or courage.
grimhollow.farewell: Keep to the path. Don't follow the lights. Especially the kind ones.

ironhaven.greeting: Inn's above the forge. Warm year-round, whether you asked for warm or not.
ironhaven.rest_prompt: %d gold. Room's sooted. Bed's iron-framed. Comes with earplugs.
ironhaven.rest_confirm: Forge runs through the night shift. You'll sleep through it. Or you won't.
ironhaven.rest_complete: Out of bed. Breakfast's charred. It's all charred. Eat it anyway.
ironhaven.save_prompt: Your name goes in the ledger. The ledger is also iron. Don't ask how.
ironhaven.cant_afford: Short on gold? Swing a hammer for an hour. Room comes free after.
ironhaven.farewell: Mind the cinders on your way out. They stick.

sandrift.greeting: Caravan rates, no questions. Bed, bath, bean stew. Stew is optional. Bath isn't.
sandrift.rest_prompt: %d gold for the night. Double if you're wanted. Triple if you're wanted here.
sandrift.rest_confirm: Put your blade under the pillow. Everyone does. Don't be the one who didn't.
sandrift.rest_complete: Morning. Your things are still there. I checked. Twice.
sandrift.save_prompt: Names cost extra. Fake names cost the same. I'd go with fake.
sandrift.cant_afford: No gold? The courtyard's free. The scorpions are free too. Negotiate with them.
sandrift.farewell: Water's at the well. Next town's three days. Budget accordingly.

maple_heights.greeting: Welcome to Maple Heights Extended Stay! Please sign in at the desk. No exceptions.
maple_heights.rest_prompt: Room rate: %d gold per night. Amenities include a continental breakfast. Emphasis on continental.
maple_heights.rest_confirm: Quiet hours are strictly enforced from 9 PM to 6 AM. That includes sighing.
maple_heights.rest_complete: Good morning! Checkout is at 11. We mean it. The HOA means it.
maple_heights.save_prompt: I'll register your stay with the neighborhood watch. That's not a metaphor.
maple_heights.cant_afford: Payment plans are available. Financing is handled by the HOA. There are terms.
maple_heights.farewell: Please complete our exit survey. It is not optional. Have a blessed day.

brasston.greeting: Welcome to the Brass Cog. Sleep is allotted in standardized increments. You've arrived at 11:47.
brasston.rest_prompt: Rest cycle: 8 hours, 14 minutes. Fee: %d gold. Surcharge for irregular sleep patterns.
brasston.rest_confirm: Your bed is calibrated. The mattress has a schedule. Do not argue with it.
brasston.rest_complete: It is 4:07. You have been woken because it is 4:07. All things happen at 4:07.
brasston.save_prompt: Your name enters the register. The register updates every hour, on the 07.
brasston.cant_afford: Insufficient funds detected. The counter requires full payment. The counter does not negotiate.
brasston.farewell: Departure noted. Next arrival expected at 4:07. Coincidence is not permitted here.

rivet_row.greeting: Inn's unionized. You're getting the full rate, whether you want it or not.
rivet_row.rest_prompt: Rest period: 8 hours. Fee: %d gold. Includes hot water, linens, and a collective breakfast.
rivet_row.rest_confirm: Lights out at 22:00 sharp. Overtime sleep is negotiable but requires paperwork.
rivet_row.rest_complete: Wake-up whistle at 06:00. You've slept the contracted amount. Productivity noted.
rivet_row.save_prompt: Your stay's logged with the shop stewards. They don't forget. They can't, by charter.
rivet_row.cant_afford: Can't pay? Join the breakfast line, do a shift, we'll square up after. Nothing's free; everything's earned.
rivet_row.farewell: Solidarity on the road. If you see scabs, don't sleep near them.

node_prime.greeting:
$ innd --greet
INFO: guest allocation available. Press A to continue.
node_prime.rest_confirm:
$ daemon sleep_cycle.start
Status: running. PID: 8047. Do not interrupt.
node_prime.rest_complete:
$ daemon sleep_cycle.complete
HP: restored. MP: restored. AP: reset.
[Process exited 0]
node_prime.save_prompt:
$ savepoint --create --tag=inn_node_prime
Writing to disk. Do not power off.
node_prime.cant_afford:
$ rest --pay=0
ERROR: insufficient funds. Try `grind --target=slime` in the adjacent sector.
node_prime.farewell:
$ logout
Session terminated. State persisted. Safe travels.

vertex.greeting: You have arrived at the place where rest is possible. This is not a room. It is a permitted pause.
vertex.rest_prompt: The cost is %d gold. The gold is a formality. The permission is the product.
vertex.rest_confirm: You are asleep. The Vertex continues without you. This is a gift you did not know to want.
vertex.rest_complete: You are awake. The world has not moved. Or it has moved exactly as much as it had to.
vertex.save_prompt: A record is made. Records here are read by someone. We do not say who. We say when: always.
vertex.cant_afford: The gold is required, even though the gold is pretext. Some rituals cannot be waived.
vertex.farewell: You leave the place of permitted pause. You carry the permission with you. You will know when to spend it.
